metadata.theme: Wire it all together, lock it down

plan_summary: Sprint 5 transitions the platform from isolated packages with in-memory mocks to a fully integrated system using real DB adapters, S3 storage, and AgentKit MCP transports. Week 1 is dedicated to the 'Critical Path' of wiring (DB adapters, Inngest registration, E2E demo workflow). Week 2 focuses on 'Hardening' (SLO alerts, SSRF protection, body limits, PII-safe logging). Due to scope risk (48 SP vs 30 SP capacity), Admin Dashboards and full Trace Context are marked as stretch goals.

tasks.name: Update Monorepo Dependencies
tasks.description: Add @inngest/agent-kit to mcp-layer and @aws-sdk/client-s3 to file-storage.

tasks.name: Drizzle Store Adapters
tasks.description: Implement Drizzle-backed adapters for Audit, DLQ, NotificationPrefs, DeliveryLog, Templates, McpRateLimit, and McpCache.
acceptance_criteria: Integration tests pass against real PG

tasks.name: Real MCP & S3 Adapters
acceptance_criteria: MCP tool calls reach real servers

tasks.name: End-to-End Workflow Demo
tasks.description: Wire real subsystems into a demo workflow: trigger → LLM analysis → HITL approval → MCP action → file storage → audit trail.
acceptance_criteria: Full workflow completes with real side-effects recorded in DB/S3

tasks.name: Observability & SLO Alerts
tasks.description: Configure SLO alerts (Success rate, HITL latency, Audit integrity) and LLM spend dashboard.
acceptance_criteria: Alerts trigger in Grafana/CloudWatch based on synthetic failures

tasks.name: Security Hardening
tasks.description: SSRF validation for outbound webhooks, body size limits (256KB), and PII-safe logging (sanitizeForLogging).

tasks.name: Trace Context Propagation
tasks.description: Propagate traceparent across Inngest waitForEvent, BullMQ, Novu, and MCP tool calls.
acceptance_criteria: Single trace spans across async boundaries in Jaeger/OTel

tasks.name: Admin Dashboard Basic
tasks.description: Next.js UI to view pending approvals, LLM costs, and audit logs.
acceptance_criteria: Admin-only pages render real data from AuditStore/HitlStore

tasks.name: Error Handling: Probes & Shutdown
tasks.description: Readiness/startup probes for DO App Platform and Graceful shutdown (SIGTERM).
acceptance_criteria: Containers drain in-flight requests before exit

risks.mitigation: INT-02 (Admin Dashboard) and INT-05 (Error Handling) are lower priority than Wiring and Security; they will be deferred if Phase 1 slips.
Senior dev owns CF-02. Use Drizzle's relational queries to minimize boilerplate.
